tasks.title: Define the movement-thruster tuning profile
tasks.objective: Define immutable movement/thruster tuning values and deterministic profile validation without freezing mature balance.
acceptance_criteria: Profile validates all accepted locomotion, bank, burst, reflection, forgiveness and contact parameters; invalid values fail deterministically.
verification: Run edit-mode profile validation, canonical-order and fingerprint-change tests.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic base locomotion
tasks.objective: Implement deterministic acceleration, braking, speed bounds and inertia from move intent independently of aim.
acceptance_criteria: Identical fixed-step inputs produce identical bounded locomotion with normalized diagonals and predictable braking/reversal.
verification: Run edit-mode acceleration, braking, reversal, clamp and deterministic replay tests.

tasks.title: Implement the thruster charge and regeneration bank
tasks.summary: Implement the thruster charge and regeneration bank.
tasks.objective: Implement charge consumption and fractional regeneration independently from burst motion.
acceptance_criteria: Charges consume once, regenerate deterministically and never duplicate, overfill or activate while unavailable.
verification: Run charge, empty-bank, recharge rollover and restart tests.

tasks.title: Implement thruster activation, steering, and exit momentum
tasks.summary: Implement thruster activation, steering, and exit momentum.
tasks.objective: Implement immediate directional velocity replacement, bounded steering, startup forgiveness, chaining and exit momentum.
acceptance_criteria: Valid activation consumes one charge, follows movement direction rather than aim, and respects bounded steering/forgiveness/exit rules.
verification: Run activation, zero-direction, steering, chaining, exit-momentum and replay tests.

tasks.title: Implement deterministic wall reflection
tasks.objective: Implement engine-independent wall-normal reflection and bounded post-impact momentum.
acceptance_criteria: Reflection is deterministic for equivalent velocity/normal inputs and rejects invalid contacts without Unity dependencies.
verification: Run reflection vector, glancing, corner, speed-bound and invalid-normal tests.

tasks.title: Implement weighted enemy-contact and grace rules
tasks.summary: Implement weighted enemy-contact and grace rules.
tasks.objective: Implement light shove-through, heavy blocking and discrete per-enemy contact grace from shared combat messages.
acceptance_criteria: Weight/contact outcomes are deterministic; grace is tracked per enemy and cannot become global invulnerability.
verification: Run light/heavy, repeated-contact, simultaneous-contact and grace-expiry tests.

tasks.title: Create the movement input action map and adapter
tasks.summary: Create the movement input action map and adapter.
tasks.objective: Map keyboard/mouse and gamepad movement actions to the same device-independent intents with focus-loss clearing.
acceptance_criteria: One movement-specific InputAction asset drives equivalent move/aim/thruster intents and clears held state deterministically.
verification: Run play-mode device-equivalence, action-phase, simultaneous-input and focus-loss tests.

tasks.title: Bridge movement state to Rigidbody2D
tasks.objective: Apply domain movement through a fixed-step Rigidbody2D adapter without creating a second authority.
acceptance_criteria: The adapter applies domain velocity deterministically, uses only 2D physics and does not reinterpret movement rules.
verification: Run play-mode fixed-step, velocity, collision-mode and frame-rate-independence tests.

tasks.title: Bridge Unity 2D contacts to movement collision policies
tasks.summary: Bridge Unity 2D contacts to movement collision policies.
tasks.objective: Translate Unity 2D wall/enemy contacts into domain reflection, shove, blocking and grace outcomes.
acceptance_criteria: Contact classification is explicit and stable; callbacks cannot double-apply outcomes or mutate durable state.
verification: Run play-mode wall/light/heavy, duplicate-callback, corner and missing-metadata tests.

tasks.title: Assemble the movement actor runtime
tasks.objective: Compose input, locomotion, thruster, body and contact adapters into one explicit movement actor lifecycle.
acceptance_criteria: Construction/start/stop/dispose order is explicit, scene-search-free and leak-free across repeated recreation.
verification: Run lifecycle, duplicate-start, missing-dependency and 50-cycle recreation tests.

tasks.title: Expose read-only thruster status
tasks.objective: Expose immutable charge, recharge, burst, steering and readiness status without implementing HUD visuals.
acceptance_criteria: Projection is read-only, deterministic and contains every later HUD field without driving simulation.
verification: Run idle, empty, recharging, active-burst, readiness and immutability tests.

tasks.title: Add movement-thruster evidence scenarios
tasks.objective: Exercise movement in the existing benchmark arena using frozen tuning, restart, diagnostics, performance and evidence protocols.
acceptance_criteria: Scenarios cover locomotion, burst, recharge, steering, chaining, reflection, restart and contacts without editing evidence scenes.
verification: Run scripted replay, 50 restarts, validity propagation, performance-hook and manifested-evidence checks plus human feel review.
